districts.name: Intake Gate
districts.summary: Carts, confiscated wonders, and frightened clerks queue beneath numbered arches.
districts.featureDescription: Brass measures in the arch record every object entering and leave a deliberate blank for those that escape.

districts.name: Evidence Yard
districts.summary: White lanes divide dangerous objects into categories whose boundaries keep changing.
districts.featureDescription: A charter-glass frame turns slowly toward whichever nearby thing is least documented.

districts.name: Clerks' Row
districts.summary: Narrow offices exchange forms through slots smaller than a human apology.
districts.featureDescription: The hatch is shut, but fresh paper breathes through its seams.

landmarks.name: the burned registry tower
landmarks.description: A survey tower burned from the inside; its brass index still calmly lists the missing flames.

districts.name: Censor Gate
districts.summary: Inspection queues braid through white arches while charter lamps search carts for metaphor.
districts.featureDescription: Its lenses compare each passerby against a person the state would find easier.

districts.name: Inner Court
districts.summary: Petitions, precedents, and palace traffic circle the calm center of imperial power.
districts.featureDescription: Licensed water repeats the shape of every ruling made within earshot.

districts.name: Archive Quarter
districts.summary: File bridges join sealed offices above alleys where copyists sell yesterday's official truth.
districts.featureDescription: Brass feet let this cabinet follow the office currently responsible for it.

landmarks.name: the withdrawn monument
landmarks.description: An empty plinth commemorates a victory removed so thoroughly that pigeons avoid remembering it.

districts.name: Ferryward
districts.summary: Punts knock against oath-posts while travelers negotiate which bank they promised to reach.
districts.featureDescription: Each notch records a crossing; one fresh notch records a boat that has not arrived.

districts.name: Reed Market
districts.summary: Green bundles, smoked eels, remedies, and quiet warnings change hands beneath patched awnings.
districts.featureDescription: Cloudy light makes every offered object briefly reveal who needs it most.

districts.name: Water-Shrine Quarter
districts.summary: Household bowls and willow screens make a neighborhood of small, stubborn sanctuaries.
districts.featureDescription: Rain in the basin repeats the names of households that sheltered strangers.

landmarks.name: the drowned memory mill
landmarks.description: A millwheel turns below still water, grinding forgotten names into silver silt.

districts.name: Echo Gate
districts.summary: Porters tune their loads before the mountain is allowed to hear them.
districts.featureDescription: The blue fork hums the true weight of every burden passing beneath it.

districts.name: Light-Cistern Court
districts.summary: Faceted towers store afternoon for workshops, concerts, and royal emergencies.
districts.featureDescription: Amber daylight sleeps behind blue facets and rolls over in response to song.

districts.name: Tuners' Steps
districts.summary: Open workshops test cracked crystal against snow, bells, and opinionated wind.
districts.featureDescription: Graduated hollows compare a crystal's answer to the mountain's oldest note.

landmarks.name: the silent avalanche
landmarks.description: A white wall of snow hangs motionless above the path until somebody sings the missing note.

districts.name: Harpoon Quay
districts.summary: Winches, black rope, and returning boats make every arrival sound heroic.
districts.featureDescription: The drum is broad enough to haul a whale or an especially stubborn version of events.

districts.name: Tale-Hall Ward
districts.summary: Ale benches and carved rafters hold several mutually incompatible civic histories.
districts.featureDescription: Every back-slat depicts a different person taking credit for the same rescue.

districts.name: Scrimshaw Yards
districts.summary: Bone dust whitens busy workshops where debts become pictures and pictures become evidence.
districts.featureDescription: Half-finished scenes wait for witnesses to argue them into completion.

landmarks.name: the walking whale rib
landmarks.description: A single enormous rib advances one finger-width inland after every storm.

districts.name: Starting Gate
districts.summary: Horses, wagers, and sworn witnesses crowd beneath copper starting bars.
districts.featureDescription: Copper rings tighten when a rider intends to break the declared terms.

districts.name: Witness Square
districts.summary: Umpires hear disputes in public while dust preserves its own account underfoot.
districts.featureDescription: Wheel marks appear across the clay top whenever somebody describes the disputed finish.

districts.name: Chariot Yards
districts.summary: Axles, reins, horse-song, and competitive advice fill long red workshops.
districts.featureDescription: The cradle rocks gently whenever a nearby wheel remembers speed.

landmarks.name: yesterday's finish line
landmarks.description: A white line crosses empty grass; hoofbeats arrive each dusk from a race nobody saw begin.

districts.name: Cloth Gate
districts.summary: Travel cloaks and tariff banners argue in color before anyone opens their mouth.
districts.featureDescription: Every imported cloth looks briefly guilty beneath the frame's imperial gray thread.

districts.name: Argument Market
districts.summary: Dyers and brokers sell thread by defending it loudly against every neighboring color.
districts.featureDescription: Anyone may add one row, provided it contradicts the pattern intelligently.

districts.name: Loom Quarter
districts.summary: Shuttle-rods clatter behind bright walls where patterns carry gossip faster than speech.
districts.featureDescription: Its cloth updates whenever a runner knots new information into the warp.

landmarks.name: the unraveling road
landmarks.description: A strip of woven paving comes loose at sunset and is rolled back into place by dawn.

districts.name: Lock Gate
districts.summary: Barges wait under lettering that explains water's obligations in exquisite detail.
districts.featureDescription: Copper numerals announce the water level in a voice borrowed from the last engineer.

districts.name: Letter Square
districts.summary: Public inscriptions, apprentices, and legal copyists make civic language physically crowded.
districts.featureDescription: One open space in the inscription waits for a letter nobody has designed safely.

districts.name: Canal Workshops
districts.summary: Gate teeth, reed pens, pumps, and bright brass parts occupy every dry surface.
districts.featureDescription: Miniature gates redirect a thumb-width canal that nonetheless has a tide.

landmarks.name: the drowned alphabet
landmarks.description: Stone letters lie beneath clear canal water; fish arrange themselves into missing punctuation.

districts.name: Herd Gate
districts.summary: Low rails guide horses gently while humans queue with considerably less dignity.
districts.featureDescription: White wood carries the unease of every horse touching the far end.

districts.name: Grass-Hearth Common
districts.summary: Herb wine, horse counsel, and open cooking fires gather beneath an enormous sky.
districts.featureDescription: Braided herbs identify which pasture the arriving wind crossed last.

districts.name: Tack Quarter
districts.summary: Soft leatherwork and grass braid are fitted to animals consulted before customers.
districts.featureDescription: No horse has worn it, but each sleeping nearby adds a new road to the tooling.

landmarks.name: the standing gallop
landmarks.description: A herd-shaped fold in the grass races east without changing location.

districts.name: Guest Gate
districts.summary: Arrival cords sort strangers into guest, debtor, cousin, danger, and unresolved.
districts.featureDescription: Old cords tighten or loosen as people state their names beneath them.

districts.name: Many Hearths
districts.summary: Clan fires share one broad court while ancestors compete to improve the arrangements.
districts.featureDescription: Each clan contributes one coal; sparks consistently favor the absent families.

districts.name: Ancestor Lane
districts.summary: Shrines, genealogists, and discreet family arguments occupy houses built around old trees.
districts.featureDescription: Carved faces change their resemblance according to who is currently apologizing.

landmarks.name: the orphan hearth
landmarks.description: A warm stone hearth waits in open country for a family nobody remembers losing.

districts.name: Warning Gate
districts.summary: Travelers compare charms beneath signs that disagree about the safest direction.
districts.featureDescription: Six warnings hang visibly; the frame casts the shadow of a seventh.

districts.name: Black-Rope Square
districts.summary: Guides, curse brokers, and goat disputes meet on a ledge wider than local honesty.
districts.featureDescription: Black cords connect places by grievance rather than distance.

districts.name: Shale Yards
districts.summary: Herder pens and charm workshops cling to terraces cut around older prohibitions.
districts.featureDescription: Every stone bears an apology to a different cliff, several of them sarcastic.

landmarks.name: the backward watchtower
landmarks.description: Its arrow slits face the mountain, watching for something expected to emerge from stone.

districts.name: Caravan Gate
districts.summary: Shade contracts, water tallies, and arriving animals pass beneath mirrored sun-cloths.
districts.featureDescription: The copper face shows how much noon each traveler still owes the road.

districts.name: Shade Market
districts.summary: Awnings sell distinct temperatures while well-singers test every jar of water.
districts.featureDescription: A blue awning holds a square of late day even at noon.

districts.name: Well Court
districts.summary: Caravan news and royal water law circulate around a deep, opinionated well.
districts.featureDescription: Its echo returns a traveler name instead of the sound offered.

landmarks.name: the camp that departed yesterday
landmarks.description: Warm coals and taut tent shadows remain after every person, animal, and tent has gone.

districts.name: Tide Gate
districts.summary: Pilots sing arrivals through shell arches while customs clerks race the returning water.
districts.featureDescription: Different shells ring according to which hidden channel is currently honest.

districts.name: Low-Tide Exchange
districts.summary: Cargo, pearls, favors, and sung contracts trade hands on ground available for one hour.
districts.featureDescription: One pan holds goods; the other fills slowly with seawater and urgency.

districts.name: Notation Quay
districts.summary: Sound-ink pilots paint routes on black boards between workshops full of tuned hulls.
districts.featureDescription: Wave notes rewrite themselves as ships choose channels offshore.

landmarks.name: the drowned argument bell
landmarks.description: A bronze bell below the tide rings whenever two ships disagree about right of way.

districts.name: Moving Gate
districts.summary: A flower arch relocates between arrivals and insists this has always been the entrance.
districts.featureDescription: Roots gather their soil into little bags whenever the road grows too certain.

districts.name: Festival After
districts.summary: Stalls, ribbons, and music remain vividly present despite the absence of any agreed festival.
districts.featureDescription: Footprints perform last night's dances without feet.

districts.name: Lawless Gardens
districts.summary: Gardeners cultivate colors, distances, and minor repeals of natural law.
districts.featureDescription: Its clipped mouth chews paper laws into bright migrating beetles.

landmarks.name: the bone circle where rain waits
landmarks.description: Bright rain hangs motionless inside a ring of antlers until somebody tells it where to fall.
